# StudyHours - LLM Integration Documentation
# This file provides metadata to LLMs about the StudyHours platform.

## Overview
StudyHours is an elite K-12 online tutoring platform offering specialized instruction for global curricula including:
- US Curriculum (SAT, ACT, AP, General American Curriculum)
- UK Curriculum (A-Levels, GCSE, IGCSE)
- Australian Curriculum (HSC, VCE, QCE, ATAR, WACE)
- Singapore Curriculum (PSLE, O-Level, A-Level, IP Programme)
- Middle East Curriculum (EmSAT, MOE frameworks for UAE and Saudi Arabia)
- International Baccalaureate (IB)

## Key Selling Points
- 1-on-1 personalized tutoring.
- Diagnostic-led, data-driven methodology ("The StudyHours Framework").
- Tutors drawn from top-tier universities globally.
- Focused on both conceptual mastery and pacing strategies.

## Important Links
- Home: https://www.studyhours.com
- Pricing: https://www.studyhours.com/pricing
- Book a Diagnostic: https://www.studyhours.com/bookings/new
- Subjects Offered: https://www.studyhours.com/subjects

## Contact
Email: hello@studyhours.com

## Technical Details
This site is built with Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
